data.name: Stepmom Speedrun
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Stepford Heights - a quiet suburban town with one unusual distinction: the highest stepmom-per-capita ratio in America.

Every year, the dads pack up for the Annual Fishing Trip Weekend, leaving behind their beautiful, lonely wives. This year, you've decided to attempt something legendary: beat the World Record.

THE CHALLENGE

You have exactly 48 in-game hours. Twenty stepmoms scattered across town. One goal: seduce them all before the dads return.

But this isn't just about charm - it's about SPEED. Every second counts. Every route matters. Can you optimize your path to stepmom supremacy?

GAMEPLAY FEATURES

- Speedrun Mechanics: A real-time countdown creates genuine tension as you race against the clock

- Route Optimization: Discover the most efficient paths between locations - the difference between victory and defeat

- Multiple Strategies: Different "strats" unlock as you learn stepmom schedules and preferences

- New Game+ Mode: Keep your knowledge of optimal routes and unlock advanced strategies

- Leaderboard System: Compare your times against other players worldwide

- Skip Previously Seen Content: Speedrun mode lets you blast through dialogue you've already read

20 UNIQUE STEPMOMS

Each stepmom has her own personality, location, schedule, and seduction requirements:

- Yolanda, the Yoga Instructor - Find her at the community center during morning classes

- Veronica, the Wine Mom - Catch her at the country club after 5pm

- Patricia, the PTA President - Always at the school planning the next fundraiser

- Gwen, the Gamer - Streams from her basement setup all night long

- Felicia, the Fitness Fanatic - Runs the local gym with military precision

- Carmen, the Cougar - Prowls the upscale bars downtown

- Beth, the Bookworm - Lost in novels at the town library

- Charlotte, the Chef - Runs the fanciest restaurant in town

- Isabella, the Influencer - Always looking for the perfect photo spot

- Nina, the Nurse - Works the night shift at Stepford General

- Linda, the Lawyer - Burns the midnight oil at her downtown firm

- Aurora, the Artist - Creates masterpieces in her converted garage studio

- Rachel, the Real Estate Agent - Shows houses all over town

- Tanya, the Teacher - Grades papers at the local coffee shop

- Tiffany, the Trophy Wife - Shops at the premium mall all day

- Bianca, the Biker - Hangs out at the dive bar on Route 9

- Charity, the Church Lady - Volunteers at every community event

- Diana, the Divorcee - Drowns her sorrows at happy hour

- Francesca, the Foreign Exchange - Explores the town with wide-eyed wonder

- Victoria, the Mayor's Wife - The FINAL BOSS. Heavily guarded. Maximum difficulty.

STORY

What started as a joke between friends has become a legendary challenge. The "Stepmom Speedrun" has its own online community, complete with route guides, frame-perfect strats, and heated debates about RNG manipulation.

You're a newcomer to the scene, but you've studied the masters. You know the shortcuts. You've memorized the schedules. Now it's time to prove yourself.

But as you race through Stepford Heights, you might discover there's more to these women than conquest points. Each stepmom has her own story, her own desires, her own reasons for being receptive to your advances.

Will you stick to the optimal route? Or will genuine connections slow you down?

GENRE

A comedic visual novel that parodies speedrun culture while delivering engaging adult content. Combines time-management gameplay with branching narratives and multiple endings.

CONTENT

- Adult visual novel with explicit scenes

- Satirical humor targeting speedrun/gaming culture

- Multiple endings based on completion time and choices

- 20+ hours of content for completionists

- 45 minutes to 2 hours per speedrun attempt

REPLAYABILITY

- Unlock new routes and strategies each playthrough

- Discover hidden shortcuts and time-saves

- Multiple endings based on your final time

- Gallery mode to revisit favorite scenes

- Achievement system for various speedrun milestones

data.short_description: Stepford Heights has the highest stepmom-per-capita in America. The dads are gone for Fishing Weekend. 20 stepmoms. 48 hours. Can you beat the World Record?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs 10.10 or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04.7 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
